input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.1.1
            TITLE: the efficiency is based on a metric of the amount of fuel consumed or energy used and the lap

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.1.1: The Efficiency is based on a metric of the amount of fuel consumed or energy used and the lap
D.13.1.1 The Efficiency is based on a metric of the amount of fuel consumed or energy used and the lap 
time on the endurance course, averaged over the length of the event.

final_answer: The Efficiency is based on a metric of the amount of fuel consumed or energy used and the lap time on the endurance course, averaged over the length of the event.
